coordinates.description: Bounding box as [ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax] integers in page coordinate space.

is_continued.description: Set to true when this block's text is truncated at the bottom of the page and resumes at the top of the next page. Omit or set false for all complete blocks.

extraction_flags.description: Set when extraction quality is uncertain. Omit (or use []) for high-confidence blocks. Flags: 'partial_visibility' — block cut off at page edge; 'low_legibility' — text hard to read due to scan/contrast/overlap; 'ambiguous_type' — block type classification uncertain; 'possible_encoding_error' — text contains likely OCR or encoding artifacts.

extraction_note.description: One-sentence explanation of the specific issue on this block. Set only when extraction_flags is non-empty. Provides context for a downstream remediation agent.
